raw_consumer_statement: In XXXX XXXX XXXX  my card was lost or stolen and used. I reported this and my issue is that my credit was immediately ran by the credit card company and my limit was reduced. This was not resolved as I left the country. I spoke to them again this month XX/XX/2023 and they immediately ran my credit again and reduced my limit. This is beyond an abusive and unfair banking practice. The left of my card and use should not be used against me to run my credit report both times that I contacted the company about thr same charges from XXXX and a limit reduction take place. I'm still awaiting the resolution and credit for these charges as well.
